headline: Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) Reports In-Line Q2 Results as a Quality Stock Showing Steady Gains

headline: Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q2 CY2026 Earnings
summary: Professional tools and equipment manufacturer Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales falling 3.6% year on year to $1.24 billion. Its GAAP profit of $4.96 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Snap-on Announces Second Quarter 2026 Results
